history.en: Arabian Mau cats are social and energetic. Due to their energy levels, these cats do best in homes where their owners will be able to provide them with plenty of playtime, attention and interaction from their owners. These kitties are friendly, intelligent, and adaptable, and will even get along well with other pets and children.
history.zh: 阿拉伯猫社交且精力充沛。由于精力旺盛，这些猫最适合那些能提供充足游戏时间、关注和互动的家庭。它们友好、聪明、适应性强，甚至能与其他宠物和孩子相处融洽。

overview.en: The Arabian Mau is a naturally occurring breed from the United Arab Emirates, known for its affectionate, agile, and curious nature. These cats are highly energetic and social, thriving on interaction with their human families. They are independent yet loyal, often forming strong bonds with their owners. Their playful and intelligent demeanor makes them excellent companions for active households. Arabian Maus are adaptable and friendly, typically getting along well with children and other pets when properly introduced. They have a sleek, muscular build and a short coat that comes in various colors. Their curious personality means they enjoy exploring their environment and require mental stimulation to prevent boredom. Overall, the Arabian Mau is a lively, loving cat that brings joy and energy to any home.
overview.zh: 阿拉伯猫是一种源自阿拉伯联合酋长国的自然品种，以其深情、敏捷和好奇的天性而闻名。这些猫精力充沛且善于社交，非常依赖与人类家庭的互动。它们独立却忠诚，常常与主人建立牢固的情感纽带。它们顽皮而聪明的性格使其成为活跃家庭的绝佳伴侣。阿拉伯猫适应性强且友善，在适当引导下通常能与孩子和其他宠物和睦相处。它们拥有光滑、肌肉发达的身材和短毛被，颜色多样。它们好奇的个性意味着喜欢探索周围环境，因此需要精神刺激以防无聊。总的来说，阿拉伯猫是一种活泼、可爱的猫，为任何家庭带来欢乐和活力。

care.en: Daily care for an Arabian Mau is relatively low-maintenance due to their short coat, which only requires weekly brushing to remove loose hair and keep the skin healthy. Regular nail trimming every two weeks and ear cleaning as needed are also important. These cats are very energetic, so they need at least 30–60 minutes of active play daily, including interactive toys like feather wands, laser pointers, and puzzle feeders. Providing a cat tree or shelves for climbing will satisfy their agile nature. Annual veterinary check-ups are essential, along with vaccinations and parasite prevention. Dental care, such as brushing their teeth a few times a week, helps prevent oral disease. Additionally, ensure fresh water is always available and their litter box is cleaned daily to maintain hygiene.
care.zh: 阿拉伯猫的日常护理相对简单，因为它们的短毛只需每周梳理一次，以去除死毛并保持皮肤健康。每两周修剪一次指甲，并根据需要清洁耳朵也很重要。这些猫精力旺盛，每天需要至少30到60分钟的活跃游戏时间，包括羽毛棒、激光笔和益智喂食器等互动玩具。提供猫爬架或架子供攀爬，以满足其敏捷天性。每年进行一次兽医检查是必要的，同时要进行疫苗接种和寄生虫预防。每周刷牙几次有助于预防口腔疾病。此外，确保随时有新鲜水，并每天清理猫砂盆以保持卫生。

training.en: Training an Arabian Mau is a rewarding experience due to their high intelligence and eagerness to please. Use positive reinforcement methods such as treats, praise, and clicker training to teach basic commands like sit, stay, or come. These cats are quick learners and can also be trained to perform tricks or walk on a leash. Start training early, ideally when they are kittens, to establish good habits. Keep sessions short (5–10 minutes) and fun to maintain their attention. Because they are curious and independent, patience is key—avoid punishment, as it can damage trust. Socialization training is also important: expose them to different people, sounds, and environments gradually to build confidence. Their playful nature means training can double as mental stimulation, helping prevent behavioral issues.
training.zh: 训练阿拉伯猫是一种有益的体验，因为它们非常聪明且渴望取悦主人。使用正面强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练，来教授基本指令，如“坐下”、“等待”或“过来”。这些猫学习能力快，还可以训练它们表演技巧或使用牵引绳散步。尽早开始训练，最好在幼猫时期，以建立良好的习惯。保持训练时间短（5到10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的注意力。由于它们好奇且独立，耐心是关键——避免惩罚，以免破坏信任。社会化训练也很重要：逐步让它们接触不同的人、声音和环境，以建立自信。它们顽皮的天性意味着训练可以同时作为精神刺激，有助于防止行为问题。

diet.en: The Arabian Mau requires a balanced, high-protein diet that supports its active lifestyle. Choose quality commercial cat food (wet or dry) that lists real meat as the first ingredient, such as chicken, fish, or turkey. Protein should make up at least 30–40% of their daily intake. Because they are prone to obesity if overfed, measure portions according to their weight and activity level—typically 1/3 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day, split into two meals, plus wet food for hydration. Avoid excessive treats; use them only for training. Fresh water must always be available, and a water fountain can encourage drinking. Consult your vet for specific dietary needs, especially if your cat has allergies or health issues. Avoid feeding human foods like onions, garlic, chocolate, or grapes, which are toxic to cats.
diet.zh: 阿拉伯猫需要均衡、高蛋白质的饮食，以支持其活跃的生活方式。选择优质的商业猫粮（湿粮或干粮），其中应以真正的肉类（如鸡肉、鱼或火鸡）为首要成分。蛋白质应占每日摄入量的至少30%到40%。由于它们容易因过度喂食而肥胖，请根据体重和活动水平控制分量——通常每天1/3到1/2杯干粮，分两餐喂食，并配合湿粮以补充水分。避免过量零食，仅在训练时使用。务必提供新鲜水，使用饮水机可以鼓励它们多喝水。如有过敏或健康问题，请咨询兽医以获得特定饮食建议。避免喂食人类食物，如洋葱、大蒜、巧克力和葡萄，这些对猫有毒。

livingTips.en: The Arabian Mau is highly adaptable and can thrive in both apartments and houses, provided they have enough space to play and explore. A home with vertical elements like cat trees, shelves, or window perches is ideal to satisfy their climbing instincts. They are social cats and do best when not left alone for long periods; consider having another pet for company if you work long hours. These cats get along well with children and other pets, including cat-friendly dogs, especially when introduced gradually. A secure balcony or catio is recommended if you live in an apartment, as they love fresh air and watching birds. Ensure windows are screened to prevent escape. Their curious nature means they will investigate every corner, so cat-proof your home by securing loose wires and removing toxic plants. With plenty of attention and enrichment, they will be happy and well-behaved.
livingTips.zh: 阿拉伯猫适应性强，只要提供足够的空间玩耍和探索，它们既适合公寓也适合带院子的房屋。拥有猫爬架、架子或窗台等垂直元素的家居环境是理想的，可以满足它们的攀爬本能。它们是社交型猫，长时间独处时可能感到不适；如果你工作时间长，考虑养另一只宠物作伴。这些猫与孩子和其他宠物（包括友善的狗）相处融洽，尤其是逐步引入的情况下。如果你住在公寓，建议设置安全的阳台或猫笼，因为它们喜欢新鲜空气和观察鸟类。确保窗户装有纱窗以防逃跑。它们好奇的天性意味着会探索每个角落，因此要固定松散的电线并移除有毒植物，做好安全措施。只要给予足够的关注和丰富的环境，它们会快乐且行为良好。
